headline: Anthropic's Claude Mythos Was Supposed To End Cybersecurity: It Just Triggered The Sector's Best Rally On Record
summary: Cybersecurity stocks were called dead after Anthropic's Claude Mythos. Six weeks later, HACK, BUG and CIBR ETFs are at record highs.

headline: A Look At Fortinet (FTNT) Valuation After Its Sharp Recent Share Price Run
summary: Recent performance snapshot and business context Fortinet (FTNT) has attracted attention after a recent move in its stock price, with the share closing at US$130. Over the past month, the stock shows a 57.4% return and a 59.2% return in the past 3 months. The company operates in cybersecurity, with US$7.1b in revenue and US$1.9b in net income, primarily from its Network Security Solutions segment. Investors often watch these headline figures when reassessing expectations for future cash...

headline: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Partners with Fortinet to Secure AI Data in Real Time
summary: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is one of Louis Navellier’s top long-term stock picks. On May 12, NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) and Fortinet expanded their partnership to secure enterprise AI systems. As part of the new pact, Fortinet is to tap into Nvidia’s AI platforms and software to provide real-time protection for AI workloads. This arrangement is built […]
